series_metadata.series_description: This record series contains: 1) Investigator''s report and supporting evidence collected during investigation, e.g. audio or video files;2) Print-out of current disciplinary (deportment) history record; 3) Disciplinary determination and copy of personnel action, if it is required; This record may also include: 1) Pre-disciplinary notice; 2) discipline substitution notice; 3) Pre-disciplinary waiver; 4) Hearing Officer's report; 5) Settlement (Last chance/Abeyance) agreement; and/or 6) Copy of grievance case file documents including final arbitration award/decision, if discipline is overturned. NOTES: Settlement agreements with terms extending beyond the retention period established in this schedule will be retained with individual's personnel file. OSHP auxiliary member administrative investigation records are retained in the Office of Strategic Services in accordance with this schedule.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Electronic: current and ; Paper: Maintain in office files scanned and uploaded in EIR
